feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said that the United States and Iran hav…
entry.content: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said that the United States and Iran have agreed to a framework for a peace deal that would end the months-long conflict in the Middle East, with a final text of the deal reached. Pakistan is now preparing for an electronic signing expected within the next 24 hours, followed by technical-level talks next week, Sharif added.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Switch 2 can't run neither GTA VI nor Stellar Blade: Blood Rain
entry.content: Did you see the X post by Stellar Blade developer? Switch 2 can't run GTA VI or Blood Rain because it's an underpowered, overpriced kids console. Nintendo's CEO said the plan was to make Switch 2 live as long as Switch. Switch 2 has been out for one year, and already it can't handle the newest games. https://strawpoll.com/jVyG2G94QZ7

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Computer/smartphone/internet use has given me insomnia. I literally don't have t…
entry.content: Computer/smartphone/internet use has given me insomnia. I literally don't have the patience to sleep anymore no matter how tired I am, I'm constantly anxiously twitching to check for the latest information, news, or messages. I can't stop thinking or wanting go use the bathroom. All of this started after the lockdowns. I JUST WANT TO FUCKING SLEEP WHY DO I NEED A MILLION DISTRACTING STRESSING THOUGHTS AND DECISIONS AND SCHEMES ON MY MIND? I literally can't do anything anymore every day, it is a

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Nihilists and Atheists are really making me sad
entry.content: I believe that nothing simply dies or ends, it just returns. I'm not religious, I just don't want to perish and never have the opportunity to have a new life. Imagine, I could be a prince saving a princess in another world. Or a space traveler. A viking adventurer. Or an Earthling boy in an alternative Earth taking place in the 80s-2010s. I just want to have knowledge about the unknown. Will I be able to have a new life if I doze off eternally? Skepticism fears me, specially when we don't have k

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Look, Elon's sun-synchronous datacenters are going to happen. They just are. The…
entry.content: Look, Elon's sun-synchronous datacenters are going to happen. They just are. The engineering is almost trivial. I get it, though. Now that the future is here and fails to meet your ideals, you are left feeling cold and scared. I really do get it. But there's no point crying over the inevitable.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Hola! Today's Spanish word is tiquismiquis, which means fussy. And it's también …
entry.content: Hola! Today's Spanish word is tiquismiquis, which means fussy. And it's también used to describe picky eaters. But to be honest, esta word is kind of a silly one, so you don't have to pronounce it today. You can just go on with your business. Adiosito!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >ask LLM to suggest changes to a paragraph >rewrites with bunch of changes to ‘i…
entry.content: >ask LLM to suggest changes to a paragraph >rewrites with bunch of changes to ‘improve clarity’ >meaning of text is subtly different >feed AI that same text it just gave me >rewrites with a bunch of changes again, declares the text was inaccurate, vague, and lacked purpose >the paragraph no longer describe any of the same concepts of the original text It’s really sad how normgroids can’t see the inconsistencies in what LLMs produce as a problem. It’s basically a sycophant with the memory of a go

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /heals/ - Healsluts General
entry.content: Secret Finishing Move Edition /heals/: A thread for enjoying kinks in gaming: ERP, healslutting, defeat/surrender, prostitution, resourcesluts, wagers, and other kinks typically explored through games like FFXIV, Overwatch, WoW, League of Legends, HoTS, and others. All roles welcome: doms, switches, subs, sluts - DPS, tank, support, and healers. Which categories do you fall under? Discussion, lewd posting, ERP, and contact info are all welcome! >What's a Heal Slut? A heal slut is a submissive he

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2839
entry.content: >living_clothes Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83414747 >Scripts to check image metadata: rent

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Being a highly sensitive person as a man is painful. Society expects me to not h…
entry.content: Being a highly sensitive person as a man is painful. Society expects me to not have emotions, never cry in public, not be into cute things, etc. Why am I not allowed to be myself in society because of being born as male? I think that's a problem that needs to be addressed. Also I feel like that's where trans people get their beginning from. They weren't accepted as who they are merely because of their gender, and it went so far that people literally started changing it for society's acceptance.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: https://mastodon.social/@bongo20201 /116742073362454225 RIP Kuketz. Mike Kuketz—…
entry.content: https://mastodon.social/@bongo20201 /116742073362454225 RIP Kuketz. Mike Kuketz—the well-known data privacy expert and ally of the GrapheneOS developer team—has been exposed: for years, his forum had been collecting users' IP addresses and browser identifiers. So much for data privacy.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why doesn't any other manufacturer make parts diagrams and numbers available to anyone?
entry.content: Surely manufacturers would rake in money if all part diagrams and numbers with prices were available to everyone, as anyone can just purchase the OEM Part direct instead? This is especially useful for bolts when replacing rusted out bolts AFAIK only JLR allow this for their cars https://parts.jaguarlandroverclassi c.com/

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Black Stalin: You Ask for It [Kalico, 1984] Heir to the voluble wit of calypso t…
entry.content: Black Stalin: You Ask for It [Kalico, 1984] Heir to the voluble wit of calypso tradition, Leroy Calliste is droller than any Jamaican Rasta you can think of whether he's being dragged kicking and jamming into soca clichés or talking back to a vocoder that won't shut up about "better days are coming." With its Cuban horns and displaced steel drums, the music has its own witty take on the tradition. And if I don't understand every topical reference, maybe it's just as well--any kind of Rasta going

entry.title: /o/ Auto: how stupid and retarded would i be for buying a civic type r brand new. these th…
entry.content: how stupid and retarded would i be for buying a civic type r brand new. these things are nearly 50k and some dealerjews are charging almost 60k. i got the money and could buy the thing for cash but postnut clarity will make me probably regret it. a part of me wants to keep my current shitbox going for a few more years and just dump more money into the stockmarket but the teenager in me really wants a brand new type r. idk, if this posts gets dubs i'll go out and get one by the end of this year.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Stinger
entry.content: Tell me why you have not bought one yet. >$35k USD >Sub 5s 0-60/100 >Reliable af twin turbo 3.3L V6 engine >Comfy leather interior with all the trimmings (cooled seats, etc) >Not retardedly over-safety focused like newer kias >5 seater >Shitload of cargo space in boot >Can get down to 8L/100km (29mpg) on highway There is nothing else you need. It's fast, it's practical, it's reliable.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Anyone ever replace discs and calipers? How much did it cost? Bought a 15 year o…
entry.content: Anyone ever replace discs and calipers? How much did it cost? Bought a 15 year old car used and the exterior is fine except for the brakes; they look like picrel. They work fine and don't squeak, but are ugly as fuck. If decent rims were cheaper let me know since I would be fine with just hiding it.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What does it mean when a car magazine describes a front suspension as "control a…
entry.content: What does it mean when a car magazine describes a front suspension as "control arms" vs mcpherson struts vs double wishbones? I feel like a lot of this is imprecise language but are having control arms and struts mutually exclusive? I find the terminology confusing.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Should I buy Porsche 928 for 7k USD?
entry.content: 1981 model. It runs and drives and is registered. Timing belt water pump done in 2019. No logbooks. Hong Kong Import allegedly. Beige on brown. Dashboard has seen better days, otherwise seems ok. Talk me out of it anons. I make decent money but I'm not loaded. I am used to wrenching on old BMWs but haven't owned porsh b4.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is it worth it to take a CDL course just for the sake of it? I don't want to be …
entry.content: Is it worth it to take a CDL course just for the sake of it? I don't want to be a truck driver but I enjoy learning new things just for the sake of it. It's about 4K for a course at the local community college.

entry.content: https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/tr ump-administration/federal-authorit ies-investigate-giant-8647-markings -national-mall-rcna349717 Giant markings of the numbers 8647 appeared Thursday on the National Mall in Washington, prompting an investigation by federal authorities and claims of “political violence” by the White House. An Interior Department spokesperson called the incident “deranged” vandalism that “will not be tolerated.” “Any threat against the President is taken very seriously by the

entry.title: /news/ News: US lawmakers seek $750 million for Ukraine, move to adopt 'Department of War' rebrand
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/business/ae rospace-defense/us-lawmakers-seek-7 50-mln-ukraine-rename-pentagon-depa rtment-war-defense-bill-2026-06-11/ WASHINGTON, June 11 (Reuters) - The U.S. Senate Armed Services Committee on Thursday said it voted to extend U.S. security assistance for Ukraine and increase authorized funding to $750 million, the latest pushback from Congress against the Trump administration's pullback on aid for Kyiv as it fights a Russian invasion. entry.content: https://nypost.com/2026/06/10/world -news/belfast-stabbing-victim-lost- eye-during-attempted-beheading-as-s udanese-suspect-is-idd/ Barbaric video footage showed Ogilvie being pinned under the knifeman — with a horrified witness heard crying, “He’s trying to cut his head off. He’s slicing his head off.” Ogilvie suffered serious injuries to his right eye and had deep slash wounds in his head, face and back, the hearing in Belfast was told.

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ after consumer price index hits 3-year high
entry.content: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/10/tru mp-inflation-cpi-iran-oil.html President Donald Trump on Wednesday said, “I love the inflation” after being asked if he was concerned about new consumer price index data that showed the annual inflation rate at 4.2%, a three-year high. Trump, speaking with reporters in the Oval Office, also predicted that inflation is “going to come down like a rock” after the United States’ war against Iran is over. The president linked that prediction to a confusing statemen

entry.title: /news/ News: Karmelo Anthony found guilty of murder.
entry.content: https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/ karmelo-anthony-trial-verdict-austi n-metcalf-frisco-track-meet-stabbin g/ A Collin County jury found Karmelo Anthony guilty of murder in the fatal stabbing of 17-year-old Austin Metcalf during a Frisco ISD track meet, bringing an end to a closely watched trial that drew national attention and sparked debate over self-defense, race and school safety. Anthony, now 19, had been charged in the April 2, 2025, killing of Metcalf at Kuykendall Stadium in Frisco. Pro

entry.title: /t/ Torrents: Welcome to /t/orrents. Reminder ALL worksafe requests belong in >>>/wsr/ Beginne…
entry.content: Welcome to /t/orrents. Reminder ALL worksafe requests belong in >>>/wsr/ Beginners tl;dr Guide for Torrenting: >Clients There are a lot of clients to choose from, here's a couple: Deluge, qBittorrent, BiglyBT. >Downloading Most posts on /t/ will be accompanied by a magnet link which should look something like this: magnet:?xt=urn:btih:23062d6e5134677 ae10801815b6bbf4ab9092c02 These are used in your torrent client to download the torrent. e.g. In Deluge - File->Add Torrent->URL->(Paste the magnet
